research_question: Can a discovery-memory packet reconstruct a research workflow well enough for curator review before promotion?

missingness.handling_rule: Hold promotion until missing curator and corpus fields are explicitly supplied or marked out of scope.

revision_reason: Frontier benchmarks increasingly evaluate auditable research workflows rather than isolated final answers.

source_anchors.name: HeurekaBench
source_anchors.role: Motivates workflow reconstruction from study, code repository, and exploratory scientific question.

source_anchors.name: LABBench2
source_anchors.role: Motivates methodological appropriateness and relevance assessment before scientific AI outputs are trusted.

source_anchors.name: AI Co-Scientist
source_anchors.role: Motivates tool-grounded hypothesis generation with scientist feedback and explicit hypothesis updates.

boundary_conditions.species_or_population: research packets, not patients or animals
boundary_conditions.time_boundary: single packet review before memory promotion
boundary_conditions.exclusion_boundary: Does not permit diagnosis, treatment, or veterinary advice claims.

workflow_trace.reproducibility_note: A reviewer can trace each criterion to a named source anchor.
The same packet should produce the same pass/fail result.
Every promoted claim must show what evidence changed.

hypothesis_updates.before: A cited final claim may be enough for discovery memory.
hypothesis_updates.evidence_trigger: Open-ended co-scientist benchmarks require grounded workflows and verification traces.
hypothesis_updates.after: Discovery memory should require reconstructed workflow evidence before promotion.

method_fit.appropriateness_rationale: A schema gate is appropriate because the failure mode is structural: claims lack reproducible workflow metadata.
known_limitations: Synthetic fixtures cannot prove real curator utility.
Non-code wet-lab procedures may require richer provenance fields.

validation_route: Run the validator on curated valid and invalid packets, then compare reviewer agreement before and after gate adoption.
falsification_route: Reject or revise the gate if it does not reduce unsupported memory promotions or if reviewers find workflow fields non-actionable.
next_executable_action: Run the regression test file for this gate.
